name: GoviEx Uranium Inc.
description: GoviEx Uranium Inc. is a mineral resource company focused on the exploration and development of uranium projects in Africa. The company's principal objective is to become a significant uranium producer through the continued exploration and development of its flagship Madaouela Project in Niger, its Muntanga Project in Zambia, and its Falea Project in Mali. GoviEx is committed to building a portfolio of high-quality uranium assets in mining-friendly jurisdictions, leveraging its experienced management team and strong shareholder base to deliver long-term value in the nuclear energy sector.
